security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:17821; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Private local music analysis and set planning for DJs
bundle.longDescription: DJ Agent Desktop analyzes local music, creates cue points and transitions, and builds event-ready setlists without cloud uploads.
